title: Brochure or Company Profile Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional company profile. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and be able to deliver high-quality work. The project involves designing a comprehensive profile that effectively communicates our brand and values. Attention to detail and creativity are essential.

This project would have a quick turn around, hopefully having the design completed within a week of being contracted. We already have a working logo that I would like to incorporate into the design. Other than verbiage and overall color scheme, the rest of the design would be up to your discretion.

desc: I am seeking a creative designer to help design signage for my building. The ideal candidate will have experience in signage design and a strong understanding of branding. The project involves creating visually appealing signs that effectively communicate the building's identity and purpose. If you have a portfolio showcasing your signage work, I would love to see it!

title: Business Card + Logo

title: Business Card Design
desc: I am seeking a skilled designer to create a professional business card. The design should be visually appealing and effectively communicate my brand identity. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and a strong portfolio showcasing previous work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this project.

title: Business Card Design
desc: I need designs for a business card, and I will provide the logo. The ideal candidate should have experience in print design and graphic design, and be proficient in Adobe Photoshop. I'd like to be able to get 3 different designs to choose from by Wednesday, 5/20. Budget is $500.

title: Business Card Design
desc: I am looking for a skilled designer to create a professional business card. The design should be modern, clean, and effectively communicate my brand identity. The card should include my name, title, contact information, and company logo. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and a strong portfolio showcasing previous work.

title: Business Card Design
desc: I am looking for a skilled designer to create professional business cards. The design should be modern, clean, and reflect my brand identity. The cards should include my name, title, contact information, and company logo. The final design should be print-ready and delivered in a high-resolution format.

title: Business Card Design Needed Within 24 Hours
desc: I am looking for a graphic designer to create a professional business card design based on the provided information. The design should be completed within 24 hours. Please ensure the design is print-ready and aligns with the provided details.

title: Business Card Graphic Design
desc: I’m looking for a creative graphic designer to craft a professional business card that reflects my brand’s personality and leaves a memorable first impression. Scope • Design a front-and-back layout tailored to standard print sizes. • Incorporate my logo, contact details, and any brand colours or fonts I provide. • Present two to three initial concepts; I’ll select one for refinement. • Supply final, print-ready files (PDF and high-resolution JPEG/PNG) along with the editable source file (AI, PSD, or similar). What I’ll share with you • Logo files and brand guidelines, if any. • Contact information and any key messaging that must appear. Success criteria • Clean, balanced design that aligns with modern graphic-design best practices. • Colours, typography, and spacing consistent with supplied brand assets. • Files meet common print shop specifications (300 dpi, CMYK, 3 mm bleed). If you have a strong eye for layout and typography and can turn feedback around quickly, I’d love to see your portfolio and discuss timelines.

title: Business Flyer Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional business flyer. The ideal candidate will have experience in flyer design and be able to deliver high-quality, visually appealing work. The project involves designing a single-page flyer that effectively communicates our brand message and attracts potential clients. Attention to detail and creativity are essential.

title: Business Flyer Update
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to update our business flyer. The ideal candidate will have experience in flyer design and print design, with a keen eye for detail and creativity. The task involves updating an existing flyer to ensure it aligns with our current branding and messaging. If you have a portfolio showcasing your previous work in flyer design, we would love to see it.

title: Business Information Brochure Creation
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a business information brochure that aligns with our branding and effectively generates sales. The project needs to be completed as soon as possible, emphasizing both visual appeal and impactful communication of our brand message. The ideal candidate will have experience in quick turnaround projects and a strong portfolio in brochure design.

title: Business card
desc: i need a great business card and also want to make a returning customer card that will get our stamp and after 5 visits or people recommend they will get cashback or some kind of gift from us will provide information about business too, the company is auto repair shop

title: Canva Designer Needed – Personal Brand Social Media Templates & Ongoing Graphics
desc: I'm a marketing agency founder building out my personal brand on social media and looking for a skilled Canva designer to own the visuals. Brand guide, logo, fonts, colors, and captions are all provided. I need someone to execute consistently and make everything look sharp. Phase 1 – Template Build: Load my brand assets into a Canva Brand Kit Design a core set of reusable, locked templates across formats: feed posts, carousels, stories, and covers Build for a personal brand aesthetic: polished and professional, but with personality Phase 2 – Ongoing Batch Design: I'll send batches of 5–10 posts at a time with captions already done You design the graphics, deliver the batch, and we repeat as needed What I'm looking for: Experience designing for personal brands, thought leaders, or founders Strong Canva skills with a clean, modern aesthetic Brand-disciplined: you follow a guide and stay consistent post to post Fast turnaround on batches and easy to communicate with No hand-holding needed. You take direction and deliver To apply, please include: 2–3 examples of personal brand or founder social media content you've designed (Canva preferred) Your estimated timeline for the initial template build Your per-post or per-batch rate

title: Canva Flyer and Poster Design Refinement
desc: I need someone to help me refine my flyers and poster design on Canva. The task involves enhancing existing designs to make them more visually appealing and effective. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and be proficient in using Canva. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.

title: Canva Journal Page Designer
desc: Seeking a designer to create 3 x editable journal pages in Canva. The pages will bullet grids, include activity trackers and other basics with regard to bullet journal/planners. The ideal candidate will have experience in Canva design and be proficient in English. The task involves creating templates that are both functional and visually appealing.

title: Canva Presentation Design Needed
desc: I have all of my content mapped out and now need a skilled Canva designer to turn it into a polished presentation. Because the entire project will be built inside Canva, I’ll send you my brand colours, fonts and any existing artwork in a shared folder; you simply work your magic on the slides, then hand back an editable Canva link so I can tweak text later if needed. The focus is exclusively on presentations—not social posts or marketing flyers—so please bring ideas on layout, visual flow and subtle animation that keep an audience engaged from the first slide to the last. I’m open to different moods, whether minimalist, corporate or something more creative, as long as the final deck looks cohesive and professional. Deliverable: • Fully-designed Canva presentation, ready for download as PDF and PPT, plus the editable Canva link.

title: Canva Presentation Designer for 145 Slides
desc: We are seeking a skilled Canva Presentation Designer to create a visually appealing presentation consisting of 145 slides. The ideal candidate will have experience in designing engaging presentations that effectively communicate information. Responsibilities include creating cohesive layouts, selecting appropriate graphics and fonts, and ensuring the presentation is polished and professional. The project requires creativity and attention to detail to deliver a high-quality final product.

title: Canva Sales Sheet Designer
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to enhance our 1-page sales sheets for wholesale customers using Canva. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and be able to create visually appealing layouts. Responsibilities include updating existing templates and ensuring the final product is professional and engaging. All of the key information is already in our template so we need someone to make them look visually better. If you have a keen eye for design and can work independently, we would love to hear from you!

title: Capability Statement Creation
desc: Looking for someone to create a capability statement for us. We have photos, product information, and branding, and just need someone to visually put it together. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and document creation, ensuring the final product is visually appealing and effectively communicates our capabilities.

title: Card Designs
desc: We need 2026 updated hero cards for a race car driver. They will be 5.5 x 8.5 inches (post card size). It will need to feature the driver, logo, a few smaller logos at the bottom and the car. The number of the car will need to be changed. The design should be based on and compliment the race team shirt. Dropbox folders will be supplied for the elements that need to go on the card. As part of this, the car number and hood logo will need to be photoshopped to updated versions.

title: Catalog Brochure Designer for Lighting Brand
desc: We are seeking a talented designer to create a catalog brochure for our home decor lighting brand. The ideal candidate will have experience in catalog design and a keen eye for detail. Responsibilities include designing visually appealing layouts, incorporating brand elements, and ensuring the final product is print-ready. If you have a passion for design and a portfolio showcasing your work, we would love to hear from you!

title: Catalog Design for Luxury Furniture Brand
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a comprehensive catalog for our luxury home furniture brand. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and graphic design, with a strong portfolio showcasing previous work in similar projects. The catalog should effectively highlight the elegance and quality of our furniture pieces, appealing to our target audience. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.

title: Catalog InDesign Graphic Designer Needed
desc: **Job Description: Catalog Graphic Designer and Production Artist** We are currently seeking a highly skilled Graphic Designer with demonstrated expertise in Adobe InDesign to develop visually compelling catalogs for our bi-annual publications. The ideal candidate will possess a strong portfolio that highlights their capability to design layouts that are not only aesthetically pleasing but also functional. We are looking for the candidate to have a consistent and dependable availability for communication and follow through. Expectations are centered around timelines and deliveries being met for every step of the catalog process. Attention to detail and the ability to collaborate effectively with our team are essential attributes for this role. Candidates with previous experience in the creation of product catalogs and a discerning eye for design are encouraged to apply. We kindly request that you submit relevant samples of your work along with your application.

title: Catalog Rework
desc: I’m looking for a highly skilled catalog designer to redesign and upgrade my existing catalog using another catalog as the main inspiration/reference. I will provide: An ORIGINAL catalog (reference/inspiration) MY current catalog (the one that needs redesigning) Your goal is to create a completely upgraded version of my catalog that looks more premium, professional, modern, clean, and visually appealing than the original reference. What I need: Professional high-end catalog design Clean and organized layouts Better typography, spacing, and alignment Consistent branding and formatting Improved page structure and visual hierarchy Better presentation of products/services Modern, luxury-style appearance Attention to detail across every page Important: Do NOT copy the original catalog directly. Use it as inspiration and improve upon it. If the original catalog contains sections/pages that my catalog is missing, recreate and improve them for my version. I want the final result to feel polished, balanced, premium, and more professional than the reference catalog. Requirements: Experience designing catalogs, brochures, or company profiles Strong layout and branding skills Ability to create modern and clean designs Good communication and attention to detail Deliverables: Print-ready final

title: Cinematic Motivational Poster Designer
desc: Hi! I’m currently building a new visual concept under my brand Copstory, focused on cinematic motivational and inspirational posters with a premium design. I’m looking for a designer to create posters that are both motivational and inspirational, aligning with my brand's identity. The project involves creating a visual concept that resonates with a wide audience.

title: Classic Informational Brochure Design
desc: I'm seeking a talented designer to create a 3-page informational brochure. The brochure is aimed at providing information to our existing clients. Key Requirements: - 3 pages, traditional and classic design style - Informational content for existing clients Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proven experience in designing brochures - Strong portfolio showcasing traditional and classic design aesthetics - Excellent layout and typography skills - Ability to communicate effectively and incorporate feedback Please provide samples of previous work, and ensure your design approach aligns with a traditional and classic aesthetic.

title: Cleaning/Care Company Branding
desc: I have a logo for a cleaning/care company and need full branding done for it (logo attached). The deliverables are: Brand Identity & Assets: - Full Brand Guidelines (template will be provided) - Brand Pattern (1920 x 1280px) - Imagery (minimum 10 images) - High-resolution files (PNG, JPEG, PDF, SVG) & source files Print & Digital Design: - Double sided business card design (85 x 55mm) - Letterhead Design (A4) - Email Signature Design (600 x 100px) - x4 Instagram Highlight Icons (500 x 500px) - Social Media Banner (YouTube: 2560 x 1440px & Twitch: 1920 x 480) - x4 Custom Social Media Templates: 2 posts converted into stories (1350 x 1080px for post & 1080 x 1920px for story) Social Media: - Instagram carousel showcasing logo mockups/whole brand (1350 x 1080px) Unlimited Revisions

title: Commercial Cleaning Company Branding & Marketing Materials Designer (Canva Expert)
desc: ASB Pro Cleaning Solutions is a growing commercial cleaning company serving Southwest Louisiana. We are seeking a professional graphic designer to help create polished, professional marketing materials for commercial office prospects. Must Be Located In The United States Project Includes: Commercial presentation folder pages Capability statement Company overview sheet Service guide Commercial cleaning flyer Proposal template Testimonial page Canva templates Business card updates Future marketing material design Brand Style: Professional Modern Clean Corporate Minimalistic Service-based business Requirements: Canva expert Experience designing business marketing materials Strong typography and layout skills Print-ready PDF experience Portfolio of brochures, presentations, capability statements, or corporate marketing materials Please Include: Portfolio examples Years of experience Estimated project cost

title: Company Logo Assets Creation
desc: I need company logo assets for my existing logo. I have a mockup that the logo should retain the same design. The task requires maintaining the original design while possibly enhancing or adapting it for different formats. The ideal candidate should have experience in logo design and be able to work with existing designs.

title: Convert Images to Vector Files
desc: Hello! I need someone to help me take images I have generated and turning them into actual vector files that can be used for embroidery, printing, web, and other applications. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and vector graphics, and be able to deliver high-quality files that meet the requirements for different uses.

title: Convert JPEG and PNG company logos to EPS & SVG Vector files
desc: We are looking for a graphic designer to convert approximately 6–8 company logos from JPEG/JPG/PNG format into clean vector files. Deliverables: EPS files SVG files High-quality vector recreation of each logo Additional task: One existing color logo (black, white, and yellow) needs to be converted into a clean black-and-white EPS/SVG version. Requirements: Experience with Adobe Illustrator or similar vector design tools Ability to manually recreate logos when auto-tracing does not produce professional results Final files must be clean, scalable, and editable Attention to detail and accurate font/color matching Please include: Examples of previous logo/vector conversion work Estimated turnaround time Confirmation that all files will be delivered in editable vector format All logos are company-owned assets. This is a straightforward project with potential for additional graphic design work in the future. The expectation is that this would take a week or less to complete.

title: Corporate Business Card Design
desc: I’m ready to refresh my business cards and need a clean, professional layout that aligns with our corporate branding. The card must feature: • My name and job title • Our company logo and physical address • Complete contact details (email and phone) • A scannable QR code linking to our website Please work strictly within our established company colour palette so the final piece sits perfectly alongside existing collateral. I’ll supply the logo files, colour references and the URL for the QR once we start. Final deliverables should include print-ready PDFs with bleed, plus the original, editable source file (Illustrator or InDesign preferred). Once approved, I’d also like a high-resolution PNG for quick digital sharing. If you have previous corporate card samples, feel free to share a couple so I can see your style. Let’s create something sharp that represents the brand with confidence.

title: Corporate Company Profile Redesign
desc: We are looking to redesign and modernize our corporate company profile for a Saudi technology company. The goal is to create a premium and modern profile suitable for enterprise and government clients. Scope includes: Improving overall layout and visual identity Redesigning pages professionally Infographics and statistics visualization Services & products presentation Arabic & English support Delivering editable source files The content is mostly ready and we can share the current profile after discussion. Please share: Similar work samples Estimated timeline Your quotation for the project

title: Corporate Company Profile Redesign
desc: We already have the content and branding direction, but we need a modern, premium, and highly professional design suitable for enterprise and government clients. The profile includes: 61-slide Company overview Services & products Statistics & achievements Case studies Infographics and visual enhancements The current company profile will be attached. Please include: Similar work samples Estimated timeline Pricing for the full redesign project

title: Corporate Graphic Design Support
desc: Looking to have a graphic designer support in a few small projects. - VIP Invites in email embedded format (classy, corporate, professional, following brand guidelines) - Print Materials for an agency: - Service offerings 1 sheet for sales - Info sheet for sales

title: Corporate PowerPoint Template Design
desc: I need a professional PowerPoint template for my company overview. The design should be corporate and include: - Custom slide layouts - Infographics - Icons and visual elements Ideal skills and experience: - Strong graphic design proficiency - Experience with PowerPoint template creation - Ability to design engaging infographics and icons - Corporate branding knowledge Please provide samples of similar work.

title: Corporate PowerPoint Visual Overhaul
desc: I have an existing slide deck that needs a full visual refresh while keeping every word and figure intact. The priority is a polished, professional-and-corporate look that aligns with our brand guidelines, so color palettes, typography, and logo usage must stay consistent across every slide. Here’s what I need from you: • A redesigned PowerPoint master template (title, section break, and content layouts) built around our approved brand colors. • All current slides migrated into the new template with balanced white space, clean typography, and subtle, business-appropriate visuals or iconography. • A short usage guide so anyone on my team can add future slides without breaking the visual consistency. The finished file should open flawlessly in Microsoft PowerPoint 365, with fonts embedded and no external asset links. I’ll supply the current deck and a brief brand sheet as soon as we start; you return a single .pptx ready to present.

title: Cover work for Cozy Mystery
desc: Hello, I am looking for someone to create a cover for my cozy mystery books. If the first one goes well this could be the beginning of a lucrative relationship. The covers need to be professional looking and eye-catching. I need someone who responds quickly and takes feedback well. The goal is to get to a finished cover within a week’s time. So, all in all, I am looking for a professional designer who has excellent design and communication skills. My rate is $50 per cover and I am looking at doing a series. Please submit your Cozy Mystery cover examples, what you usual turnaround time is, and your experience level. When you apply, please make the first words on your application “Cozy mysteries”. I look forward to hearing from you soon! Bonnie Innocentini

title: Cozy Mystery covers
desc: Hello, I'm looking for someone to design eye-catching covers for my series of Cozy Mystery books. I need someone who is creative yet efficient, and who can give and take detailed feedback. I really need a professional designer who has excellent design and collaborative skills. I am looking for a rate of $100 per cover and I will be doing a series, so this can be an ongoing relationship. Please submit some Cozy Mystery cover design examples, your typical turnaround time, your experience level, why you find creating covers is a joy. When you apply, make the first word on your application ‘Cozy covers.’ I look forward to hearing from you soon! Leslie Shore

title: Create 18x24 Banner
desc: I need someone to create an 18x24 banner using the design I have. The task involves bringing the existing design to life in the specified size, ensuring it is visually appealing and ready for print. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and be able to work with Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.

title: Create 2 Simple Flyers for a tutoring program (front & Back)
desc: I urgently need someone who can complete two flyers. The flyers can keep the same format, but must be different colors. 1. The first Flyer will be for free tutoring. It needs to be 8.5x 11, front & back. The back will be FAQs 2. The second Flyer will be for paid tutoring. It needs to be 8.5 x 11, front & back. The back will be FAQs. I will provide the logos, text, QR code, and registration link for completion. I DO NOT need a complicated design. I just need the information to be formatted professionally and look like it was professionally done. I need the flyers back within 4 hours. I need them completed ASAP. I will award immediately if you can do the work in the time frame listed.

title: Create Infographic in 3 Different Sizes
desc: Notes: 1. Please have a neutral color scheme. 2. Use graphics suitable for corporate, and business-to-business marketing. 3. No logo/branding is required. Ensure that there is enough space above the "sources" portion (at the bottom of the document). 4. Please keep the "sources" in a very small font. 5. THREE Sizes: 1080x1080, 800x2000, and 8.5 x 11 inches 6. File: PNG 7. Font: Open Sans 8. Timeline: Complete within 3 days. Thank you!!

title: Create Product Label
desc: I need a product label design for my dissolvable oral strips. I've created and attached a rough draft of the style I'd like, colors, and all key information needed on the product package. I can also send inspiration pictures as well for what I'm looking for. This will be the first product, if I love the design, I will hire for the rest of the line.

title: Create Quick Presentation for Award Ceremony
desc: I need someone to create a quick presentation of about 5 pages for a visual during an award ceremony. The presentation should be visually appealing and professional, highlighting key points and achievements. The task is urgent and needs to be completed within a short timeframe.

title: Create Upscale 50th Birthday Card
desc: I need someone to take a photo I designed and add it to a thank you/invitation for my 50th birthday. The card should be printed in an upscale way, and I am open to design suggestions. The project requires expertise in graphic design and printing to ensure a high-quality finish.

title: Create a 50th birthday invite that replicates front page and pg1. of l'equipe newspaper
desc: Hi. I have been trying to format the invite myself but to no avail. It is for my husbands 50th bithday. I would like the information and pics I provide to replicate the French newspaper l'equipe. While he is French, I am Italian and we always have rivalry in sport which is why there are photos and headlines related to the Italian soccer team. I will attach the copy I had been working on. Feel free to laugh at how bad the layout is and how it doesnt look like a newspaper at all All the text you need is on the attached copy . Feel free to change the silouette to him smashing a ball. Im not a fan of the one I included

title: Create a WAY better thumbnail for my two YouTube thmumbnails
desc: I have 2 YouTube thumbnails but they are low quality and I want a redesign that just has the 2 faces and no text for the names/titles. Mainly showcase the 2 faces and some high quality thumbnail design that captures this "VS" format video. In total, I want the two attached thumbnails have a quality redesign that keeps the photos and removes the other text that are below each image. Just want to focus on the two images and capture a sense of conflict and possibly curiosity if that is possible

title: Creating a Canva Presentation for a Webinar for an exclusive & high ticket river cruise experience
desc: Looking for someone to make a presentation for a 1 hour webinar for the Ultimate Foodie Cruise (UltimateFoodieCruise.com): an exclusive, fully customized foodie cruise experience on the Rhine River. I have a full script, notes, and rough timeline for the webinar. I will need some infographics (to compare our cabin pricing with what it would cost to do this trip independently) and pricing with and without the discount code (to increase sales in the first 48 hours), an aesthetic that matches the landing page, and a high end yet approachable vibe that lends to closing high ticket sales. There are also notes that need to be added to each slide, which will be provided. I will give you the link to the cruise line and this itinerary, the link to the landing page (provided above), Dropbox access with scenery, food, and traveler pictures and videos to use throughout. I need someone with an eye who can take these components and turn it into one streamlined piece that is eye catching, drives FOMO, and helps convert sales.
